lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: This fairy ring will take you out of Zanaris. It leads to the place known as Al-Kharid in your realm. Once passed you can not return this way.

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Before leaving make sure that you have fully sampled the delights of our marketplace.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'll stay down here a bit longer.
